summary: Frontend E2E testing for Velstrax. Executed 18 scenarios covering homepage (loading screen, hero, sticky nav scroll, GR/EN language toggle, services/process/portfolio/footer), contact form submission, admin login (bad/good creds, unauth redirect), admin Settings (save + footer reflection), portfolio CRUD (create/edit/delete), messages list, logout, and mobile responsive nav. All 18 scenarios passed.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboardPage.jsx is ~488 lines and combines settings/portfolio/messages/modal in one file — consider splitting into Settings/Portfolio/Messages subcomponents for maintainability (>700-line threshold not yet hit but trending).
deleteItem() uses native window.confirm; works in Playwright via dialog handler but consider a styled confirm modal for premium UX consistency with the rest of the design system.

AdminLoginPage.onSubmit catches err and uses err.response?.data?.detail; if backend ever returns network error (no response) the fallback to t('admin.invalid') is good — verified during bad-creds test.

Contact submission stores the budget label string directly (incl. Greek symbols like '€5K–€10K') as data-testid value; works but couples test selector to translated text — consider stable index-based testids (contact-budget-0..3).
Footer instagram update verified live: PUT /api/settings → public GET /api/settings reflected immediately on next homepage load. Good.
Test admin instagram link was overwritten to https://instagram.com/velstrax_qa_test during testing — main agent may want to restore to the original brand value via admin panel.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 contact submission (TEST_QA Tester / qa+test@example.com) via the contact form — visible in admin Messages tab. Portfolio TEST_QA item was created, edited, then deleted (clean).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows green. Use data-testids: admin-settings-{email|instagram|youtube|tiktok} (NOT *_url). Budget chip testids are translation-dependent (e.g. contact-budget-€5K–€10K) — prefer querying by prefix and clicking by index. Loading screen takes ~2.4s; wait for [data-testid=loading-screen] to detach before interactions. /auth/me returning 401 on logged-out pages is normal/expected — not an error. JWT cross-origin works via Authorization header (vx_token in localStorage).
